recommendations.title: The Bothersome Man
recommendations.overview: Forty-year-old Andreas arrives in a strange city with no memory of how he got there. He is presented with a job, an apartment - even a wife. But before long, Andreas notices that something is wrong. Andreas makes an attempt to escape the city, but he

recommendations.title: After the Wedding
recommendations.overview: A manager of an orphanage in India is sent to Copenhagen, Denmark, where he discovers a life-altering family secret.

recommendations.title: Bird Box
recommendations.overview: Five years after an ominous unseen presence drives most of society to suicide, a survivor and her two children make a desperate bid to reach safety.

recommendations.title: In a Better World
recommendations.overview: The lives of two Danish families cross each other, and an extraordinary but risky friendship comes into bud. But loneliness, frailty and sorrow lie in wait.

recommendations.title: Things We Lost in the Fire
recommendations.overview: A recent widow invites her husband's troubled best friend to live with her and her two children. As he gradually turns his life around, he helps the family cope and confront their loss.

recommendations.title: Open Hearts
recommendations.overview: Cecilie and Joachim are about to get married when a freak car accident leaves Joachim disabled, throwing their lives into a spin. The driver of the other car, Marie, and her family don’t get off lightly, either. Her husband Niels works in the hospita

recommendations.title: Love Is All You Need
recommendations.overview: Ida, a Danish hairdresser who has lost her hair to cancer, returns home from the hospital one day to find her husband is cheating on her. She decides to travel to Italy on her own for her daughter's wedding, but discovers on arriving that the wedding

recommendations.title: Brothers

recommendations.title: Simple Simon
recommendations.overview: Simon has Asperger's syndrome and doesn't like changes in his life. He lives with his big brother Sam and Sam's girlfriend Frida. When Frida can't stand having to adapt to Simon's peculiarities anymore she takes off, leaving Simon with having to find

recommendations.title: The Gift
recommendations.overview: Simon and Robyn are a young married couple whose life is going as planned until a chance run-in with Simon's high school acquaintance sends their world into a tailspin.
